title: Airtable vs Acuity Scheduling
description: Compare Airtable vs Acuity Scheduling — a project management platform versus a productivity solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: Airtable (Project Management) and Acuity Scheduling (Productivity) serve different primary purposes. Airtable has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is project management or productivity capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Airtable and Acuity Scheduling?
faqs.answer: Airtable is a project management tool, while Acuity Scheduling is a productivity platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can Airtable replace Acuity Scheduling?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, Airtable or Acuity Scheduling?
faqs.answer: Airtable (Free–$45/user/mo) and Acuity Scheduling ($14 – $34/mo) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
